What We Offer

Expert Plastering Services

🏠

Residential Plastering

New builds, renos, and repairs for homes across Perth. Smooth, lasting finishes that transform any room.

🏢

Commercial Projects

Offices, retail, warehouses, and large-scale developments — on time, on budget, built to spec.

🛡️

Insurance Repairs

Storm, water, or impact damage? We work with insurers to restore your property fast and cleanly.

✨

High End Ceilings

Ornate cornices, coffered ceilings, bulkheads, and feature details — the premium touch your space deserves.

🔧

Plasterboard Fix

Full supply and fix of plasterboard for walls and ceilings. Proper taping, setting, and finishing included.

🔨

Patching & Repairs

Cracks, holes, water damage — no job too small. Seamless repairs that blend with existing plaster.

Why Choose Us

Perth's Trusted Plastering Team

  • ✓
    Locally Owned & Operated
    Perth-based and proud. We know local homes, conditions, and building codes inside out.
  • ✓
    High End Finishes Only
    We don't cut corners — every job is delivered to a premium standard, from small renos to luxury builds.
  • ✓
    Insurance Work Specialists
    Experienced working alongside insurers. We handle the complexity so you don't have to.
  • ✓
    Fast Response & Free Quotes
    Call Joey and get a straight, no-obligation quote with zero surprises on the final bill.
